raw_transcript: Often, yes. Drugs like Tenofovir are very effective at suppressing the virus to 'undetectable' levels, which allows your liver to stay healthy. It's usually one pill a day. We'll start the medication after we get the ultrasound results.
final_corrected_note: Often, yes. Drugs like Tenofovir are very effective at suppressing the virus to 'undetectable' levels, which allows your liver to stay healthy. It's usually one pill a day. We'll start the medication after we get the ultrasound results.
